comments.body: I'm wondering why the remote CLI tests are failing :thinking:
Will try again, if they fail again, you might have an issue.  Theoretically containers/storage should not be involved in remote.
A friendly reminder that this PR had no activity for 30 days.
Rebased on top of the latest master and https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/473 PR

@saschagrunert: PR needs rebase.
